skills.name: Claims Intent Classifier
skills.description: Classify customer intent on e-commerce after-sales channel: claim_with_image / claim_text_only / general_inquiry / needs_clarification / followup_on_prior_claim. Extracts order_id via regex+LLM. Multi-turn aware. Recognizes legal-threat-only messages as claims.

skills.name: Claims Emotion Grader
skills.description: Grade customer affect on a calibrated 0-10 scale with risk level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL). Detects legal-threat, regulator, media, chargeback, and Nth-time escalation signals. Auto-promotes to CRITICAL whenever any escalation signal fires. Bilingual EN+ZH.

skills.name: Claims Needs Discovery
skills.description: Surface surface/latent/emotional needs from customer message and conversation history. Outputs retention_risk and suggested_offer_bias. Elevates the system from policy executor to advisor — catches context like 'this mug was a birthday gift for Friday'.

skills.name: Claims Damage Vision
skills.description: Assess product damage from a photo using Gemini Vision. Returns damage_type, severity 0-10, affected_parts, normalized bounding_boxes, detected_subject. 96.7% accuracy on labeled eval set. Catches text/image mismatch attacks (e.g. user says 'mug' but image shows phone).

skills.name: Claims Compensation Proposer
skills.description: Pick matching policy from 26-rule policy DSL + RAG over merchant wisdom KB (93 entries) + live precedent. Propose typed offer (full_refund/partial_refund/replacement/store_credit) with empathetic justification.

skills.name: Claims Offer Verifier
skills.description: Hard-cap proposed offer to policy max (20% emotion flex), escalate to human when damage_confidence < 0.5 and amount > $50, request tone revision if justification too cold. Max 1 revision loop.

skills.name: Claims Fraud Image Check
skills.description: Deterministic image-provenance fraud check (no LLM): pHash collision detection catches re-used/recycled claim photos across sessions; EXIF age check catches stale photos for a 'just arrived broken' claim. Returns fraud_score 0-1, verdict (clear/suspicious/fraud), and the signals that fired.

skills.name: Text Summarizer
skills.description: Summarize long-form text into structured bullet points with configurable length and style (executive / detailed / casual). Works on any domain.

skills.name: Text Translator
skills.description: Translate text between languages with automatic source language detection. Preserves formatting and domain terminology.

skills.name: Sentiment Analyzer
skills.description: Analyze sentiment of any text into positive/neutral/negative with emotion breakdown and intensity score. Domain-agnostic.

skills.name: Deep Research (MiroFlow)
skills.description: Multi-step internet research agent powered by MiroMind's MiroFlow (SOTA on GAIA/FutureX/HLE). Searches the web, reads pages, cross-references sources, returns a boxed answer. Every MiroFlow step is SHA-256 hash-chained into a verifiable research trace.
